channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Wednesday, May 27, 2026
item.description: Today's digest clusters around two forces that directly shape your consulting pipeline: Canada's international student ecosystem is in active flux — policy changes, processing backlogs, and ApplyBoard's reckoning all signal that Canadian universities are under mounting enrolment ...
